privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real Landsat multi-spectral image downloaded from the opengeos repository. It requires calculating NDVI, standardizing it to create a Z-Score band, and a final stressed mask. Output files must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/vegetation_anomaly.dim (with required custom bands NDVI, NDVI_Z_Score, Stressed_Mask) and /home/ga/snap_exports/stressed_mask.tif. The exported data allows a 0.15 tolerance for standardizing the Z-score mean to 0 and standard deviation to 1.
